name: Golden Chicken and Noodles
recipeIngredient: 6 Boneless skinless chicken breast halves (1 1/2 lbs)
2 cans (10 3/4 oz each) condensed broccoli cheese soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken pieces in half and place them in a 5-quart slow cooker.
2. Combine the soup, milk, onion, salt (if desired), basil, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
5. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook an additional 5-6 hours or until the meat juices run clear.
6. Serve hot over noodles. Yield: 6 servings.
